roa.docketEntryComment: /TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 2 D/CTS: 2/CTORD: DEFEDANT TO PERFORM 6 MONTHS OF COUNSELING AND 40 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE TO BE MONITORED BY PRETRIAL DIVERSION/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO NOT TO POSSESS, OWN OR CONTROL ANY ANIMALS DURING THE COURSE OF THIS PROBATION/VF1/MPROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/BKFEE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/DISM3/BE/CTORD: RESTRICTIONS PLACED ON ANIMAL CARE AND CONTROL REGARDING THE PRESERVATION OF EVIDENCE IN THE FORM OF THE DOG INTHEIR POSSESSION ARE NOW LIFTED/CONTD PTD PROG RPT/CGTW/PROGPTD: 08-25-11/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/

/CAL: HEARING AS TO POSSESSION OF THE VICTIM, AN AUSTRALIAN SHEPPARD DOG/CTORD: THE DOG IS EVIDENCE IN THIS CASE AND WILL REMAIN IN THE POSSESSION OFSF ANIMAL CARE AND CONTROL/CTORD: ANIMAL CARE AND CONTROL MAY PLACE THE DOG IN A FOSTER HOME HOWEVER,AS THE DOG IS EVIDENCE IN THIS CASE, ANIMAL CARE AND CONTROL REMAINS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE EVIDENCE IN THE CASE, TO WIT, THEDOG/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/CTORD:THAT DURING PENDENCY OF THIS CASE ANIMAL CONTROL IS TO RETAIN CUSTODY AND CONTROL OF THE ANIMAL/CONTD:HEARING AS TO POSSESSION DOG PENDING OUTCOME OF THIS CASE/DOP/
